title: Founder's Associate
location: London (Hoxton), 5 days in-office + UK customer travel
office_cadence_note: StudySmarter/Jack & Jill listing states verbatim: 'London (Hoxton, 5 days in-office)' and 'No working from home possible'. 5 days/week in person + UK customer travel; remote not available. Verified 2026-06-10.
working_week_note: RE-VERIFIED 2026-06-11 against the user's ACTUAL dealbreaker (weekend/6-7-day work only — 5-day Mon-Fri in-office is FINE). StudySmarter listing states verbatim: 'Based in London with ability to work in-person in Hoxton 5 days a week' and 'London (Hoxton, 5 days in-office)'. NO mention of weekends, Saturday, Sunday, or a 6/7-day week. This is a standard Mon-Fri 5-day week. The prior IN-OFFICE 'DEALBREAKER' flag was WRONG (it conflated 5-day in-office with weekend work). FINE — NOT a dealbreaker. Reinstated.
ats: No public careers page on joinletty.com (careers/jobs return 404). Distributed via Jack & Jill (boutique placement, jobs.ashbyhq.com/jack-and-jill) and surfaced on BeBee / StudySmarter / LinkedIn. Jack & Jill Ashby posting-api returns 404 (gated board) so no single canonical per-role ATS URL.
recency_note: BeBee listing states 'posted 1 week ago', expires 27/06/2026 (active). Estimated posting ~2026-06-03 (~7 days). Sits at the <1wk(88)/1-2wk(72) boundary; scored G=88 honouring the <1wk bracket and the explicit 'expires 27/06' active window. Date is inferred (no exact ISO timestamp on a gated Jack & Jill board), hence medium confidence.
live_evidence: BeBee (Jack & Jill source): Status Active, expires 27/06/2026, 'posted 1 week ago'. StudySmarter listing shows OPEN/active. (NOTE: a SEPARATE Letty 'Founding Operator' LinkedIn req 4418172450 is now CLOSED — that one was a CS/implementation-engineering-leaning seat gating on SQL + reading Python/FastAPI/TS; this Founder's Associate is the distinct, NON-engineering ops seat and is still live.)
hidden_gate_check: PASS. No degree bar (none stated; Ryan's 2:1 BA clears regardless). No SWE/coding gate — explicitly 'ability to use AI tools', not software engineering (contrast the separate, now-closed Founding Operator seat which DID require SQL/Python-reading). No IB/PE/MBB or elite-degree filter. UK-eligible (London in-office, UK customer travel) — clears Ryan's UK-auth-only constraint. Only soft gate: wants 2-4yr as ex-founder / CoS / early-stage operator — Ryan's Minima FA + first-employee 1->30 + seed/Series-A support clears this squarely. In-office 5 days Hoxton is a logistics (Cambridge->London relocation) consideration, not a disqualifier (Ryan is relocating to London).
key_evidence: Letty: agentic-AI PropTech transforming how homes are rented & sold; AI agents autonomously negotiate rents, book viewings, dispatch tradespeople, reconcile ledgers. EF + Hoxton Ventures backed, $5.5M+ raised, live in UK agencies with early US traction. Genuinely agentic-AI native.

Role = 'first full-time hire' / 'operational backbone': run end-to-end recruitment (eng + commercial), own early-stage people ops (onboarding, culture), coordinate payroll/accounting/legal, and act as CEO strategic thought-partner on market entry/pricing/partnerships + build decision materials. Explicit growth path to Head of Ops / Chief of Staff / COO.

BULLSEYE on Ryan's #1 archetype (FA/CoS at pre-A->A startup) AND his lived spike: Minima Founder's Associate (hiring support, investor updates, pitch decks for $2.5m seed, ambiguous-priority->workstreams) + first employee scaling 1->30 seed->Series A. The JD reads like his Minima FA bullets.

Explicitly NON-engineering: requires 'ability to use AI tools' + resourcefulness, not coding — directly compatible with Ryan's operator-not-SWE profile AND his Claude-Code agent-building spike (credible 'uses AI tools' signal, not just ChatGPT).
£55-75K base + founding equity — comfortably above the £50k floor; strong conversion signal. Full-time, London.
Routes via Jack & Jill (boutique, human/founder-curated placement) = low ATS keyword-filter risk, high human-read probability; founder (Jon Hammond) active on LinkedIn.
Momentum GREEN: just $5.5M+ funded, opening its FIRST full-time operator seat, expanding UK->US — exactly the 'fresh raise = fresh operator seat' thesis the watch-list was built to catch.
biggest_lever: This JD maps almost line-for-line onto Ryan's Minima Founder's Associate experience (hiring/people-ops, payroll/legal coordination, fundraising-adjacent decision materials, founder thought-partner) at the exact seniority (2-4yr ex-founder/early-stage operator) and exact archetype (FA/CoS, pre-A AI-native startup), with NO SWE gate and a human Jack & Jill read. His Claude-Code agent-building doubles as the 'AI-tools-fluent' proof.
biggest_risk: 5-days/week in-office in Hoxton (Cambridge->London relocation logistics) and PropTech (not crypto/AI-consumer) domain, though agentic-AI native softens the domain gap. Distributed listing with no canonical ATS URL = apply path is via Jack & Jill/BeBee, and posting date is inferred (~7d) not exact-timestamped.
apply_verdict: APPLY (priority) — highest-fit operator/FA seat found this sweep: direct archetype + spike match, no SWE gate, fresh raise (green momentum), recent (~1wk), human founder-read via Jack & Jill, salary above floor. Lands above all current operator leaders.
ranking_context: callback_op 83 -> would rank #1 of the operator set, above Gradient Labs 77, Dwelly Integration 74, Specter 70, Corgi 65, Light 63, Checkout 61, Togather 59.
